TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: pintriqan_Malapang_馬拉邦戰役
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == ryax pinlahang ki'an rhzyal ~泰安鄉 'ringan zyaw 事件起因 nisan mwah Taywan "ri ban" Gipun ga qpzing patus mhut Taywan. qapul nha Bari Tahuw lga, mrhuw Buyong mgyay maras ggluw maki' zik rgyax tqalang Malapang. 1902 kawas pintriqan/Ega mwah ggluw ru mrhuw na Saysyaq ka Akuwai tlqing qalang Malapang. Bari tin 7 byacing 6 ryax tmu hetay magal cyutay ru tzyu tahuw. ini qlu mu tayhuw squ qalang. ita Tayal ru Saysyaq Akuwai kinr'ngu nha qmhzyaw. tlqing squ pinhaga ru zik hlahuy uruw. memaw kzihung muruw hetay na Gipun. ana ga lokah iyal payus hetay Gipun. 11 byacing 25 ryax wal si lomun kwara qalang Malapang. 27 ryax lomun nha galang Suru uzi. te 12 byacing 17 ryax ita tayal trang sbalay ta Gipun ga, tgruw qu Gipun kutan nha tayal 39 mhuqil, mpuw msyaw qelis. Gipun si agal mhut ru tqruw qmul hlhlahuy Taywan. Tayal hiya ga wal lomun hriqun qalang mhwah qpzing. golan qyunam tmwang rhzyal binah. .
S.PHON: == rjax pinlaħaŋ kiʔan rħzjal ~*** ʔriŋan zjaw **** nis~ɕan mwaħ tajwan "ri βan" ɣipun ɣa qpziŋ patus~ɕ mħut tajwan. qapul nħa βari taħuw lɣa, mrħuw βujoŋ mɣjaj maras~ɕ ɣɣluw makiʔ zik rɣjax tqalaŋ malapaŋ. **** kawas~ɕ pintriqan/eɣa mwaħ ɣɣluw ru mrħuw na s~ɕajs~ɕjaq ka akuwai tlqiŋ qalaŋ malapaŋ. βari tin * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax tmu ħetaj maɣal ʦ~ʨjutaj ru tzju taħuw. ini qlu mu tajħuw s~ɕqu qalaŋ. ita tajal ru s~ɕajs~ɕjaq akuwai kinrʔŋu nħa qmħzjaw. tlqiŋ s~ɕqu pinħaɣa ru zik ħlaħuj uruw. memaw kziħuŋ muruw ħetaj na ɣipun. ana ɣa lokaħ ijal pajus~ɕ ħetaj ɣipun. ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax wal s~ɕi lomun kwara qalaŋ malapaŋ. ** rjax lomun nħa ɣalaŋ s~ɕuru uzi. te ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax ita tajal traŋ s~ɕβalaj ta ɣipun ɣa, tɣruw qu ɣipun kutan nħa tajal ** mħuqil, mpuw ms~ɕjaw qelis~ɕ. ɣipun s~ɕi aɣal mħut ru tqruw qmul ħlħlaħuj tajwan. tajal ħija ɣa wal lomun ħriqun qalaŋ mħwaħ qpziŋ. ɣolan qjunam tmwaŋ rħzjal βinaħ. .
S.FORM: == ryax pinlahang ki'an rhzyal ~泰安鄉 'ringan zyaw 事件起因 nisan mwah Taywan "ri ban" Gipun ga qpzing patus mhut Taywan. qapul nha Bari Tahuw lga, mrhuw Buyong mgyay maras ggluw maki' zik rgyax tqalang Malapang. 1902 kawas pintriqan/Ega mwah ggluw ru mrhuw na Saysyaq ka Akuwai tlqing qalang Malapang. Bari tin 7 byacing 6 ryax tmu hetay magal cyutay ru tzyu tahuw. ini qlu mu tayhuw squ qalang. ita Tayal ru Saysyaq Akuwai kinr'ngu nha qmhzyaw. tlqing squ pinhaga ru zik hlahuy uruw. memaw kzihung muruw hetay na Gipun. ana ga lokah iyal payus hetay Gipun. 11 byacing 25 ryax wal si lomun kwara qalang Malapang. 27 ryax lomun nha galang Suru uzi. te 12 byacing 17 ryax ita tayal trang sbalay ta Gipun ga, tgruw qu Gipun kutan nha tayal 39 mhuqil, mpuw msyaw qelis. Gipun si agal mhut ru tqruw qmul hlhlahuy Taywan. Tayal hiya ga wal lomun hriqun qalang mhwah qpzing. golan qyunam tmwang rhzyal binah. .
S.PHON: == rjax pinlaħaŋ kiʔan rħzjal ~*** ʔriŋan zjaw **** nis~ɕan mwaħ tajwan "ri βan" ɣipun ɣa qpziŋ patus~ɕ mħut tajwan. qapul nħa βari taħuw lɣa, mrħuw βujoŋ mɣjaj maras~ɕ ɣɣluw makiʔ zik rɣjax tqalaŋ malapaŋ. **** kawas~ɕ pintriqan/eɣa mwaħ ɣɣluw ru mrħuw na s~ɕajs~ɕjaq ka akuwai tlqiŋ qalaŋ malapaŋ. βari tin * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax tmu ħetaj maɣal ʦ~ʨjutaj ru tzju taħuw. ini qlu mu tajħuw s~ɕqu qalaŋ. ita tajal ru s~ɕajs~ɕjaq akuwai kinrʔŋu nħa qmħzjaw. tlqiŋ s~ɕqu pinħaɣa ru zik ħlaħuj uruw. memaw kziħuŋ muruw ħetaj na ɣipun. ana ɣa lokaħ ijal pajus~ɕ ħetaj ɣipun. ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax wal s~ɕi lomun kwara qalaŋ malapaŋ. ** rjax lomun nħa ɣalaŋ s~ɕuru uzi. te ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax ita tajal traŋ s~ɕβalaj ta ɣipun ɣa, tɣruw qu ɣipun kutan nħa tajal ** mħuqil, mpuw ms~ɕjaw qelis~ɕ. ɣipun s~ɕi aɣal mħut ru tqruw qmul ħlħlaħuj tajwan. tajal ħija ɣa wal lomun ħriqun qalaŋ mħwaħ qpziŋ. ɣolan qjunam tmwaŋ rħzjal βinaħ. .
